query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as date, COUNT(*) as total_clicks FROM analytics_events WHERE eventType = 'affiliate_click' AND DATE(createdAt) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(createdAt);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.f21199908ec6 --database Fb7vXnzeJhLwFywj8Ci5L6 --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as date, COUNT(*) as total_clicks FROM analytics_events WHERE eventType = 'affiliate_click' AND DATE(createdAt) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(createdAt);
